channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This brain-computer interface allowed a stroke survivor to speak after 18 years
item.description: Scientists have developed a device that can translate thoughts about speech into spoken words in real time. Although it’s still experimental, they hope the brain-computer interface could someday help give voice to those unable to speak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Thousands of workers at nation's health agencies brace for mass layoffs
item.description: As they readied to leave work Monday, some workers at the Food and Drug Administration were told to pack their laptops and prepare for the possibility that they wouldn’t be back.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Seitz And Matthew Perrone, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Asus just teased that it's 'cooking something up,' and it might just be the rumored Xbox handheld
item.description: Asus seemingly just got ahead of Nintendo, by teasing a handheld, which we think might be the rumored Xbox portable.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Navigating the future of national tech independence with sovereign AI
item.description: Sovereign AI refers to a national or regional effort to develop and control artificial intelligence (AI) systems, independent of the large non-EU foreign private tech platforms that currently dominate the field.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nuclear Power Plant to Be Built in Texas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, is planning to build next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 23andMe’s rise and fall, in four charts
item.description: Just months after it started trading on the Nasdaq in June 2021, the company was valued as high as $5.8 billion. As of Friday, the firm’s shares were worth less than a dollar.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Scientists hope a newly discovered flower will return after rain in West Texas
item.description: Scientists who want to learn more about a tiny, newly discovered flower in West Texas are hoping it will bloom again in a couple of weeks after rain finally fell in the area.
item.dc:creator: Jamie Stengle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The Vital Importance of Protecting Active Directory from Cyber Threats
item.description: Protecting Active Directory (AD) from cyber threats is crucial for businesses, as it grants privileges to users that determine what data they can access and what level of control they have over the IT environment.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Netflix reveals Black Mirror season 7 episode titles and there are some big clues for what fans of the sci-fi series can expect
item.description: Black Mirror has confirmed episode titles, including its first-ever sequel episode following on from USS Callister.
item.dc:creator: lucy.buglass@futurenet.com (Lucy Buglass), TechRadar

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: DISA’s Jeff Marshall on aligning tech to solving warfighter problems
item.description: DISA pursues a two-pronged customer experience strategy to ensure its IT services meet warfighters’ needs, the director of J9 Hosting and Compute says.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: DEI rollbacks: Where top tech vendors stand
item.description: In the wake of the Trump Administration’s campaign against DEI initiatives, signing executive orders banning it in the federal government, many companies in the tech industry have fallen in line.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: GenAI, the future of fraud and why you may be an easy target
item.description: With the help of artificial intelligence, sophisticated fraud techniques emerging today are virtually undetectable to the untrained eye.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google introduces Gemini 2.5 reasoning models
item.description: Google has introduced version 2.5 of its Gemini AI model, which the company said offers a new level of performance by combining an enhanced base model with improved post-training.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Hypori’s Jared Shepard on implementing zero trust security on mobile devices
item.description: The Hypori CEO details cloud approach and tactics for using mobile devices for secure collaboration. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Hypori’s Jared Shepard on implementing zero trust security on mobile devices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Modernize enterprise PC fleets to ensure AI ambitions deliver business success
item.description: Investing in the right kind of PCs helps businesses innovate, become more secure and adapt to new ways of working. They also ensure that enterprises have a foundation from which to implement crucial AI-driven improvements that can boost productivity and growth.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Musk: Trump will 'go after' people 'pushing the lies' about Tesla
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk suggested Thursday that the Trump administration will crack down on vehicle vandalization, expressing his concerns about protesters targeting Tesla dealerships across the U.S. and abroad.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: News and insights
item.description: Nvidia GTC 2025 has become a landmark event, solidifying the company’s position at the forefront of the AI technology. This year the major theme was agentic AI, which represents a shift from data generation to AI systems capable of autonomous reasoning and decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Preserve loved ones' voicemails on iPhone
item.description: Saving the voices of loved ones can be a comforting way to keep alive memories. Kurt "the CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to preserve voicemail messages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiny electric vehicle takes half a parking space
item.description: Toyota's compact electric FT-Me is designed to tackle challenges of city living while offering an accessible and eco-friendly transportation solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 20 powerful women shaping the networking industry
item.description: Women are severely underrepresented in top leadership roles across the business world. Only 10.4% of the Fortune 500 companies have women CEOs. In an AP survey of S&P 500 companies, only 25 of 341 CEOs were women. That disparity extends into the technology sector.
item.dc:creator: Network World
